question: In each of the fiscal years of 2018-19, 2019-20, and 2020-21, which five counties submitted their reports the latest? Then consider all counties that appear in the three years, define a good hospital as one with as low mortality rate as possible under the condition of having at least 2 'Better' ratings, and find the county among those counties that has at least one hospital in the top 50 statewide list. In that county, in which year was the all-cause unexpectedly 30-day rehospitalized rate the 4th lowest? Among the men's singles finals at the four Grand Slam tournaments in that year, how many lasted exactly four sets? Please return only the number in the format [Answer].

1.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3

source = 'datagov/counties-that-filed-late-or-failed-to-file-fy-2018-19-ftrs-edcdb/files/rows.txt'
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3").get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), dtype=str, low_memory=False)

df["County"] = df["County"].fillna("").str.strip()
df["Date Report Submitted"] = pd.to_datetime(df["Date Report Submitted"], errors="coerce")
ranked = df.sort_values(["Date Report Submitted", "County"], ascending=[False, True], kind="mergesort").reset_index(drop=True)
answer = ", ".join(ranked.head(5)["County"].tolist())
1.subquestion: In the fiscal year of 2018-19, which five counties submitted their financial transactions reports the latest?

4.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3

source = 'datagov/california-hospital-inpatient-mortality-rates-and-quality-ratings-63b1a/files/imi_gis_long_2022.txt'
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3").get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), dtype=str, low_memory=False)

node_1_answer = "Tuolumne, Humboldt, Mendocino, Inyo, Yuba"
node_2_answer = "Humboldt, Inyo, Tuolumne, Mendocino, Yuba"
node_3_answer = "Humboldt, Mendocino, Lassen, Tuolumne, Inyo"
all_counties = []
for value in [node_1_answer, node_2_answer, node_3_answer]:
    all_counties.extend([part.strip() for part in str(value).split(",") if part.strip()])
target_counties = sorted(set(all_counties))

df["COUNTY"] = df["COUNTY"].fillna("").astype(str).str.strip()
df["HOSPITAL"] = df["HOSPITAL"].fillna("").astype(str).str.strip()
df["Hospital Ratings"] = df["Hospital Ratings"].fillna("").astype(str).str.strip()
df["mort_num"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Risk Adjuested Mortality Rate"].astype(str).str.extract(r"([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?)", expand=False), errors="coerce")
filtered = df[df["Hospital Ratings"].eq("Better") & df["mort_num"].notna()].copy()
ranked_hospitals = filtered.groupby(["COUNTY", "HOSPITAL"], as_index=False).agg(
    avg_mort=("mort_num", "mean"),
    better_rows=("Hospital Ratings", "size")
)
ranked_hospitals = ranked_hospitals[ranked_hospitals["better_rows"].ge(2)].copy()
ranked_hospitals = ranked_hospitals.sort_values(
    ["avg_mort", "better_rows", "COUNTY", "HOSPITAL"],
    ascending=[True, False, True, True],
    kind="mergesort"
).reset_index(drop=True)
top50 = ranked_hospitals.head(50).copy()
answer = ", ".join(sorted(top50[top50["COUNTY"].isin(target_counties)]["COUNTY"].drop_duplicates().tolist()))
4.subquestion: Define a good hospital as one with as low mortality rate as possible under the condition of having at least 2 'Better' ratings. With such definition, find the top 50 best hospitals in the whole state and among all counties from <hop 1 answer>, which counties have at least one hospital in the top 50 hospital list?

5.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3

source = 'datagov/all-cause-unplanned-30-day-hospital-readmission-rate-california-lghc-indicator-36e12/files/allcauseunplanned30-dayhospitalreadmissionratecalifornia2011_2022.txt'
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3").get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), dtype=str, low_memory=False)

df.columns = [str(c).replace("\n", " ").strip() for c in df.columns]
node_4_answer = "Tuolumne"
filtered = df[df["County"].fillna("").astype(str).str.strip().eq(str(node_4_answer).strip())].copy()
for col in ["30-day Readmission Rate (ICD-9)", "30-day Readmission Rate (ICD-10)"]:
    filtered[col] = pd.to_numeric(filtered[col].astype(str).str.replace("%", "", regex=False), errors="coerce")
filtered["rate"] = filtered["30-day Readmission Rate (ICD-9)"].fillna(filtered["30-day Readmission Rate (ICD-10)"])
filtered["Year_num"] = pd.to_numeric(filtered["Year"], errors="coerce")
ranked = filtered.sort_values(["rate", "Year_num"], ascending=[True, True], kind="mergesort").reset_index(drop=True)
answer = str(ranked.iloc[3]["Year"])
5.subquestion: In <hop 2 answer>, in which year was the all-cause unexpectedly 30-day rehospitalized rate the 4th lowest?
